evals.prompt: Ingest my Kindle highlights for 'The Mythical Man-Month'.
evals.expected_output: Direct paste handling for the export; book-note schema; a wiki/books/{slug}.md page created plus 2-5 atomic notes for standout ideas.

evals.prompt: Save these podcast notes — Lex Fridman ep with Karpathy.
evals.expected_output: Pasted notes captured into the book-note schema (treating the podcast as a 'reading' source) with atomic notes extracted.

evals.prompt: Ingest this paper PDF I just read.
evals.expected_output: ingest-document cleans the PDF; book-note schema; structured book/paper page + atomic notes.
